content: Just as curiosity-driven intrinsic motivation mechanisms (like ICM in autonomous agents) prioritize exploring uncertain, high-information environments to grow capability, 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory systems can be rearchitected to treat unintegrated, ambiguous existing memory traces as the 'uncertain environment' that curiosity drives the agent to explore. This creates a self-reinforcing cycle where the agent actively revisits conflicting or poorly encoded old memories to prune, connect, and update its knowledge base without external labeled data.
